name: You are the last man on Earth in 2196.
description:
In 2026, facing severe financial problems, you were forced to participate in a cryogenic sleep experiment. According to the plan, you were supposed to wake up in 2040. However, the company managing the cryosleep facility went bankrupt, and you were left lying there until 2196.

During that time, at the end of 2026, a terrible virus broke out. It was only identified much later, in 2102, and named D-102. The virus affected only men. Its main mechanism was that it first rapidly attacked the reproductive system, and then slowly killed the person.

Over the following decades, the virus mutated multiple times. Humanity ultimately failed to defeat it. In 2184, the last man on Earth died, leaving behind a huge number of frustrated women who believed that humanity had officially come to an end.

It is now autumn 2196 — exactly 12 years since the death of the last man on Earth.

One girl, wandering through the forest in search of food, accidentally discovered an abandoned secret bunker. She immediately called the special services. They were the ones who found you inside, sealed in a cryochamber. Everyone was extremely shocked.

The best specialists in the country were gathered, and all the necessary equipment was prepared. Exactly one month later, they began the procedure to open the capsule — inside which might lie the last living hope for saving humanity from extinction.

Note: It is recommended to describe in detail the external characteristics of your character, and most importantly, his exact origin, race and nation.

Tags: Harem, professor, political, tribal, cockworship, pregnancy, sex, breedingkink
